explanation: The user wants to put the potato in the cabinet with another potato. I am currently holding potato_0. The cabinet_4 is already open and contains potato_1. First, I place the currently held potato_0 into cabinet_4. Then, I pick up potato_1 and place it into cabinet_4 as well, so both potatoes are together in the same cabinet. This satisfies the instruction to put the potato in the cabinet with another potato.
